central_paradox_survived: No in principle, yes in implementation. Design resolves it, but attorney gate is unimplemented.
key_improvements: Central paradox resolved in design — chose attorney backing
AI limitations disclosure comprehensive and structural
Seller disclosures verbatim with programmatic guard
Advisory language fully removed from negotiation service
remaining_blockers: CRITICAL: Attorney gate is a type definition, not a system — attorneyReviewCompleted hardcoded false with no mutation path
CRITICAL: Personalized savings calculator uses synthetic comp data
key_insight: Homer chose attorney backing over search engine immunity — the single most important strategic decision. But the attorney review exists as TypeScript interfaces and hardcoded booleans, not as a functioning workflow. If a consumer pays $1,499 for 'attorney review included' and no attorney reviews anything, the grade drops back below BB.
